title: Star Reflection Public Pilot Preview Data

labels.release_note: No personal prediction, clinical assessment, sensitive profiling or decision advice.

records.reflection_basis: Day-level pilot basis; birth time is not yet used.
records.reflective_theme: This basis may be read as an invitation to notice where attention is scattered and where clarity can be gently restored.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What is one area today where a simpler view may help you respond with more steadiness?
records.grounding_practice: Write one short sentence naming what needs attention, then pause before acting.
records.limitation_notice: This is a reflective pilot preview, not a deterministic prediction or personal decision advice.

records.reflection_basis: Day-level pilot basis; birth time is not yet used.
records.reflective_theme: This basis may be used as a prompt to slow the first reaction and choose a measured response.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Where would a little more patience change the quality of your next action?
records.grounding_practice: Before replying or deciding, take three calm breaths and restate the matter in neutral words.
records.limitation_notice: This is contemplative guidance only and does not predict events or outcomes.

records.reflection_basis: Day-level pilot basis; birth time is not yet used.
records.reflective_theme: This basis can be read as a lens for aligning intention, speech and action without forcing certainty.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Which intention deserves to be made clearer before you move forward?
records.grounding_practice: List one intention, one supporting action and one unnecessary distraction.
records.limitation_notice: Use this as a reflective lens, not as medical, financial, legal or life-decision advice.

records.reflection_basis: Day-level pilot basis; birth time is not yet used.
records.reflective_theme: This basis may suggest a gentle review of boundaries, commitments and available energy.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What boundary would help you preserve steadiness without closing yourself off?
records.grounding_practice: Choose one commitment to simplify, defer or complete with care.
records.limitation_notice: This reflection remains symbolic and non-deterministic.

records.reflection_basis: Day-level pilot basis; birth time is not yet used.
records.reflective_theme: This basis may be read as an invitation to distinguish useful signals from noise.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What information is truly needed before you form a conclusion?
records.grounding_practice: Separate facts, assumptions and emotions into three short notes.
records.limitation_notice: This pilot reflection does not provide certainty, prediction, clinical assessment or professional advice.
